body.title: CLOSED: swarm notification rule — intent-only gate, ygm_check wired
body.result: has_intent predicate + ygm_check integration; 16 tests; commit 11782bf
body.description:
Implement the notification rule: notify only when an envelope is addressed with clear intent to the recipient (direct address or @-mention in channel). No ambient stream notifications — observability channels are silent unless the recipient is specifically targeted.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/listener.py, agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/announce/broker.py, agent_datacenter/devices/claude/ygm_check.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — intent detection on envelope (direct address vs. channel broadcast), notification gate that fires only on intent. OUT — notification transport (YGM/discord/tmux — those devices already exist); channel subscription mechanics (T-swarm-channel-mechanism).
**Test plan:** unit tests — direct-addressed envelope triggers notification; broadcast envelope without @-mention does not; @-mention in channel body triggers notification for mentioned participant only.
**Pass condition:** An envelope broadcast to `shared` with no @-mention produces zero YGM notifications; the same envelope with `@cc.0` in the body produces exactly one notification to the CC.0 participant.
